name: MinerSentinel
description: Unified monitoring dashboard for Bitaxe and Avalon Bitcoin miners
compose:
name: slashnode-miner-sentinel
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:17.7
    container_name: miner-sentinel-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: minersentinel
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: minersentinel
      POSTGRES_DB: minersentinel
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  backend:
    image: dcbert/minersentinel-backend:v1.0.3
    container_name: miner-sentinel-backend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: |
      sh -c "
        python manage.py migrate &&
        python manage.py collectstatic --noinput &&
        (python manage.py createsuperuser --no-input ||
        echo 'Superuser already exists or created — winning!') &&
        gunicorn minersentinel.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:8000 --workers 2 --timeout 120
      "
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      POSTGRES_HOST: miner-sentinel-db
      POSTGRES_PORT: '5432'
      POSTGRES_DB: minersentinel
      POSTGRES_USER: minersentinel
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: minersentinel
      DJANGO_SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DJANGO_DEBUG: 'False'
      ALLOWED_HOSTS: '*'
      CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS: http://${node.exports.host}:3082,http://*.ts.net:3082
      CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS: http://${node.exports.host}:3082,http://*.ts.net:3082
      DJANGO_SUPERUSER_USERNAME: admin
      DJANGO_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      DJANGO_SUPERUSER_EMAIL: admin@umbrel.local
      API_BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3082
  frontend:
    image: dcbert/minersentinel-frontend:v1.0.3
    container_name: miner-sentinel-frontend
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - backend
    environment:
      VITE_API_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3082
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3082:80
  data-service:
    image: dcbert/minersentinel-data-service:v1.0.3
    container_name: miner-sentinel-data-service
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
      - backend
    environment:
      POSTGRES_HOST: miner-sentinel-db
      POSTGRES_PORT: '5432'
      POSTGRES_DB: minersentinel
      POSTGRES_USER: minersentinel
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: minersentinel
      BACKEND_URL: http://miner-sentinel-backend:8000
      BITAXE_POLL_INTERVAL: '60'
      AVALON_POLL_INTERVAL: '60'
      POOL_POLL_INTERVAL: '300'
      TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ''
      TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ''
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-miner-sentinel_db_data-db
notes: Ported from Umbrel (miner-sentinel). Upstream: https://github.com/dcbert/miner-sentinel. Default login — user: "admin", password: "".
